## Type of Change

- [ ] New Azure resource added
- [ ] Existing resource modified
- [ ] Variable / output change

## Checklist

<!-- All items must be checked before merging into main -->

- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` ran and passed locally
- [ ] All additions and modifications should follow design guidelines in `DESIGN.md`
- [ ] Relevant outputs added to `outputs.tf` for new resources
- [ ] README.md `<!-- BEGIN_TF_DOCS -->` section is up to date (regenerated by `terraform-docs` hook)
